<button
              type="button"
              onClick={() => {
                if (applyMutation.isPending) return;
                if (showSuccess) {
                  onDone?.(success);
                  return;
                }
                onClose?.();
              }}
              className="px-4 py-2 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 bg-white text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 text-sm"
              disabled={applyMutation.isPending}
            >
